description_long: This is a handwoven basket-style handbag made from natural wicker or rattan, featuring a rounded, crescent-shaped body with a deep, open cavity. The weaving is tight and robust, with visible gaps between the strands, giving it a rustic and artisanal appearance. Two sturdy, arched handles are attached at either end, allowing for easy carrying by hand. The coloration varies from medium to dark brown, with some lighter highlights on the handles and rim, suggesting natural material variation. The interior is open and unlined, revealing the same woven structure as the exterior. There are no visible closures, logos, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a simple, utilitarian design.
description: A rustic, crescent-shaped handwoven wicker handbag with two arched handles and an open, unlined interior. The surface features natural brown tones and a tightly woven pattern.
description_view_0: The handbag is seen from the side, highlighting its crescent shape, open top, and the two arched handles rising from each end.
description_view_1: Viewed from the end, the handbag's rounded profile and the parallel placement of the handles are prominent, showing the depth and width of the opening.
description_view_2: This view mirrors the first, again emphasizing the crescent form, open cavity, and the symmetry of the handles.
description_view_3: From the opposite end, the rounded, basket-like body and the two handles are visible, with the woven texture and color variation clearly shown.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, fixed arched handles made of the same woven material, attached at each end of the opening.
attribute_closure_mechanism: None; the handbag has an open top with no visible closure mechanism.
